finding_title: Touch targets do not have sufficient size or spacing.

finding_title: `[aria-hidden="true"]` elements contain focusable descendents
finding_description: Focusable descendents within an `[aria-hidden="true"]` element prevent those interactive elements from being available to users of assistive technologies like screen readers. [Learn how `aria-hidden` affects focusable elements](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/aria-hidden-focus).
item_snippet: <div class="grid-col-4 slick-slide" style="width: 254px;" data-slick-index="1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="0">
item_explanation:
Fix all of the following:
  Focusable content should have tabindex="-1" or be removed from the DOM
